phrases.text_local: Πού φεύγει το καΐκι για τη Δήλο;
phrases.cultural_note: Local answer assumes familiarity with Ornos Bay as the stable boat departure area for Delos excursions.

likely_response.local: Από την αποβάθρα του Ornos, δεξιά.
likely_response.translation_en: From the edge of the bay, next to the small harbor.

responses.english: From the edge of the bay, next to the small harbor.
responses.french: Από την αποβάθρα του Ornos, δεξιά.

phrases.text_local: Τι ώρα φεύγει το τελευταίο υδάτινο ταξί για την πόλη;
phrases.cultural_note: Exact departure times for water taxis are not publicly posted and depend on daily conditions.

likely_response.translation_en: The last water taxi to Mykonos town leaves around 7:30 PM from the dock near Ornos Beach.

responses.english: The last water taxi to Mykonos town leaves around 7:30 PM from the dock near Ornos Beach.

phrases.intent_en: Can I pay the beach bar tab by card?
phrases.text_local: Μπορώ να πληρώσω το λογαριασμό με κάρτα;
phrases.cultural_note: Payment methods may vary; staff may need to confirm specific card types accepted.
